description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has blue and white plaid checks with red  accents,  tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing, full length buttoned placket, buttoned cuffs, long sleeve with buttons on the elbows and curved hemlineFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this blue and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
